title: ACT Error envelope
description: Per PRD-100-R41, PRD-100-R42, PRD-100-R43. Wire shape for runtime 4xx/5xx error responses (gap A4). Static profile does not require this envelope (PRD-100-R44). The `error.code` enum is closed (PRD-100-R41); adding a value is MAJOR per PRD-108-R5(4). `error.message` MUST NOT contain PII per PRD-109-R14. `error.details` is open and per-code stable (PRD-100-R43). `additionalProperties: false` at the top level — PRD-100-R41 specifies this envelope shape exactly; unknown extra top-level fields would indicate malformed input.

code.description: Closed enum. Adding a value is MAJOR per PRD-108-R5(4).

message.description: Human-readable, non-PII. For logging, not parsing.

details.description: Open object; per-code stable shape. Unknown keys MUST be tolerated per PRD-108-R7.
